description: A reproduction of a vintage 'The Saturday Evening Post' magazine cover dated September 2, 1905, with a 'LABOR DAY' banner at the bottom. The illustration shows ironworkers on the steel framework of a building under construction, one standing on a beam with arms outstretched.
notable_text: THE SATURDAY EVENING POST; SEPTEMBER 2, 1905; LABOR DAY; THE CURTIS PUBLISHING COMPANY, PHILADELPHIA
